panels.title: Contributions
panels.description: EUR, current month, with evaluated_at returned. Canonical on-budget to off-budget savings/investment transfers; requires finance trust.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN f.trusted=1 THEN SUM(s.amount_cents)/100.0 END AS value,datetime('now') AS evaluated_at FROM savings_contributions s CROSS JOIN finance_trust f WHERE s.month=strftime('%Y-%m','now')

panels.title: Portfolio value
panels.description: EUR with latest valuation date returned as data_as_of. Current holdings snapshot only; not performance or tax-lot value.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN f.trusted=1 THEN SUM(h.total_value_cents)/100.0 END AS value,MAX(h.valuation_date) AS data_as_of FROM holdings h CROSS JOIN finance_trust f

panels.title: Holdings valued
panels.description: Latest valuation date reported by any current holding. Compare it with source freshness before using portfolio totals.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(valuation_date),'No holdings snapshot') AS value,MAX(valuation_date) AS data_as_of FROM holdings

panels.title: Pipeline issues
panels.description: Count now. Unresolved quarantines, duplicate candidates, authoritative missing/stale reconciliation dates, and non-zero external reconciliation gaps; inspect detail panels below.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quarantined),0) FROM pipeline_runs WHERE resolved=0)+(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data_quality WHERE resolved=0 AND (kind IN ('duplicate_candidate','reconciliation_missing','reconciliation_stale','reconciliation_future') OR (kind='reconciliation_gap' AND COALESCE(value_cents,0)<>0))) AS value

panels.title: Reported portfolio value over time
panels.description: EUR at each holdings snapshot with data_as_of returned. Reported market value only; not a contribution-adjusted return series.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT snapshot_unix AS time,SUM(total_value_cents)/100.0 AS "Portfolio EUR",MAX(MAX(snapshot_iso)) OVER () AS data_as_of FROM holdings_history GROUP BY snapshot_unix ORDER BY snapshot_unix

panels.title: Current portfolio allocation
panels.description: EUR by current holding, sorted largest first, with valuation data_as_of returned. Allocation only, not performance.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT name AS Holding,total_value_cents/100.0 AS "Value EUR",MAX(valuation_date) OVER () AS data_as_of FROM holdings ORDER BY total_value_cents DESC

panels.title: Expected source coverage and freshness
panels.description: Latest run per expected source, evaluated now. Status text, run outcome, age, and expected cadence make missing or stale coverage explicit.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH invalid_future AS (SELECT a.account_id,a.source FROM pipeline_run_accounts a JOIN pipeline_runs p ON p.run_id=a.run_id WHERE CAST(strftime('%s',p.finished_at) AS INTEGER)>CAST(strftime('%s','now') AS INTEGER)+300 GROUP BY a.account_id,a.source), coverage AS (SELECT a.*,p.finished_at,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.account_id,a.source ORDER BY a.requested_to DESC,p.finished_at DESC) r FROM pipeline_run_accounts a JOIN pipeline_runs p ON p.run_id=a.run_id WHERE a.outcome='success' AND strftime('%s',p.finished_at) IS NOT NULL AND CAST(strftime('%s',p.finished_at) AS INTEGER)<=CAST(strftime('%s','now') AS INTEGER)+300) SELECT e.account_id AS Account,e.source AS Source,c.finished_at AS "Success UTC",c.requested_to AS "Covered through",ROUND(e.expected_cadence_seconds/3600.0,1) AS "Expected hours",CASE WHEN f.account_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'INVALID FUTURE TIMESTAMP' WHEN e.expected_cadence_seconds IS NULL OR e.expected_cadence_seconds<=0 THEN 'NO CADENCE' WHEN c.run_id IS NULL THEN 'MISSING' WHEN c.requested_from IS NULL OR c.requested_to IS NULL OR julianday(c.requested_from) IS NULL OR julianday(c.requested_to) IS NULL OR date(julianday(c.requested_from))<>c.requested_from OR date(julianday(c.requested_to))<>c.requested_to OR c.requested_from>c.requested_to OR c.requested_to>date('now') THEN 'INVALID COVERAGE' WHEN c.requested_to<date('now',printf('-%d seconds',e.expected_cadence_seconds)) THEN 'STALE COVERAGE' WHEN strftime('%s','now')-strftime('%s',c.finished_at)>e.expected_cadence_seconds THEN 'STALE SUCCESS' ELSE 'CURRENT' END AS Status FROM expected_sources e LEFT JOIN invalid_future f ON f.account_id=e.account_id AND f.source=e.source LEFT JOIN coverage c ON c.account_id=e.account_id AND c.source=e.source AND c.r=1 ORDER BY Status DESC,e.source,e.account_id

panels.title: Pipeline runs and quarantined records
panels.description: Counts/day over the last 30 days. Completed runs and quarantined records use separate labels and line styles; inspect source coverage for cadence.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH run_days AS (SELECT date(finished_at) day,COUNT(*) runs,SUM(quarantined) quarantined FROM pipeline_runs WHERE finished_at>=datetime('now','-30 days') GROUP BY date(finished_at)) SELECT CAST(strftime('%s',day) AS INTEGER) time,runs AS Runs,quarantined AS Quarantined FROM run_days ORDER BY day

panels.title: Recent pipeline run detail
panels.description: Most recent 30 runs with source, timestamps, fetched/valid/add/update/quarantine counts, outcome, error code, and resolution status.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT source AS Source,finished_at AS "Finished UTC",fetched AS Fetched,valid AS Valid,added AS Added,updated AS Updated,quarantined AS Quarantined,outcome AS Outcome,COALESCE(error_code,'') AS Error,CASE resolved WHEN 1 THEN 'RESOLVED' ELSE 'OPEN' END AS Status FROM pipeline_runs ORDER BY finished_at DESC LIMIT 30

panels.title: Unresolved duplicate candidates
panels.description: Current unresolved data-quality checks classified as duplicate candidates. Review the source and detail; no rows means none are known.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT checked_at AS "Checked UTC",COALESCE(source,'') AS Source,COALESCE(account_id,'') AS Account,detail AS Detail FROM data_quality WHERE kind='duplicate_candidate' AND resolved=0 ORDER BY checked_at DESC

panels.title: Reconciliation evidence
panels.description: Current reconciliation capability/status from the producer. The public Actual API does not expose authoritative reconciled balance metadata, so no synthetic zero-gap assurance is shown; reconcile in Actual during month close.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT q.checked_at AS "Checked UTC",q.producer AS Producer,q.account_id AS "Account ID",COALESCE(a.name,'') AS Account,q.kind AS Signal,q.severity AS Severity,CASE WHEN q.kind='reconciliation_gap' THEN q.value_cents/100.0 END AS "Gap EUR",CASE q.resolved WHEN 1 THEN 'RESOLVED' ELSE 'OPEN' END AS Status,q.detail AS Detail FROM data_quality q LEFT JOIN accounts a ON a.id=q.account_id WHERE q.kind IN ('reconciliation_missing','reconciliation_stale','reconciliation_future','reconciliation_gap') ORDER BY q.resolved ASC,q.checked_at DESC
